About Me

Hi, I'm G. Meera.
I am currently pursuing BCA at RD National College. I love learning new technologies, designing mobile apps, and creating clean, modern user interfaces. My goal is to become a skilled UI/UX Designer and Software Professional. Every project I create helps me improve my creativity, problem-solving, and technical skills.
